arts.sum: Earlier today, Africa Foot stated they’ve found out from Juma Bah’s entourage that he’s finalised an agreement with Manchester City. They also said the Real Valladolid player has agreed a six-year deal with the Citizens and will be sent on loan to RC Lens in the winter market. arts.ttl: “I’d take him to England” – Insistence big Manchester City offer would have to be accepted
arts.sum: Manchester City have emerged as a credible candidate to land Juventus’ Andrea Cambiaso. There has been talk that the Citizens are prepared to make an offer of €65m for the Italian, but Juventus would want a higher amount to sell the player and they would ideally want to keep him until the summer.
